zh.lifeSummary: 當Ida Nielsdotter Svendssøn於1105年之後出生在艾歐洛時，她的父親Niels of Denmark8936歲，母親Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden8918歲。她於1129年與Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania I在波蘭申傑n斯吉波維亞特 申傑n斯吉結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1135年在賀爾左圖姆 包莫。

zh-hans.Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany: 德国史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 史萊斯維史萊斯維

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ida Nielsdotter Svendssøn于1105年之后出生在艾歐洛时，她的父亲Niels of Denmark8936岁，母亲Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden8918岁。她于1129年与Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania I在波兰申傑n斯吉波維亞特 申傑n斯吉结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1135年在賀爾左圖姆 包莫。

nameMeanings.name: Ida
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Norman name, of Germanic origin, derived from īd ‘work’. This died out during the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, influenced by its use in Tennyson's The Princess ( 1847 ) for the central character, who devotes herself to the cause of women's rights and women's education in a thoroughly Victorian way. The name is also associated with Mount Ida in Crete, which was connected in classical times with the worship of Zeus, king of the gods, who was supposed to have been brought up in a cave on the mountainside. In the 1930s it became famous as the name of the film star Ida Lupino ( 1914–1995 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Ida Nielsdotter Svendssøn was born after 1105, in Europe, her father, Niels of Denmark, was 8936 and her mother, Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden, was 8918. She married Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania I in 1129, in Szczecin District, Szczecin, Poland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1135, in Duchy of Pomerania.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ida Nielsdotter Svendssøn est née après 1105, à Europe, son père, Niels of Denmark, avait 8936 ans et sa mère, Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden, avait 8918 ans. Elle a épousé Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania I en 1129, à Powiat szczeciński, szczecińskie, Pologne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1135, à Herzogtum Pommern.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ida Nielsdotter Svendssøn nach 1105 in Europa geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Niels of Denmark 8936 und ihre Mutter Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden 8918. Sie hat 1129 in Powiat szczeciński, Woiwodschaft Stettin, Polen Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1135 in Herzogtum Pommern.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ida Nielsdotter Svendssøn è nata il dopo il 1105 nel Europa, sua padre, Niels of Denmark, aveva 8936 anni e sua madre, Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden, aveva 8918 anni. Lei sposato Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania I nel 1129, nel Powiat szczeciński, szczecińskie, Polonia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1135, nel Herzogtum Pommern.

ja.lifeSummary: Ida Nielsdotter Svendssønが1105年以後にヨーロッパで生まれた時，父Niels of Denmarkは8936歳，母Margaret Fredkulla of Swedenは8918歳であった。1129年にポーランドスズクズエシnスキポウィアト スズクズエシnスキでDuke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1135年にハーゾグトゥム ポンメルンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ida Nielsdotter Svendssøn(이)가 1105년 이후 우럽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Niels of Denmark(은)는 8936세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden(은)는 8918세였다. 그녀는 1129년 폴란드 스즈치시n스키 파위앳 스즈치시n스키에서 Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1135년 허초그투 폼머에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ida Nielsdotter Svendssøn nasceu após 1105, em Europa, seu pai, Niels of Denmark, tinha 8936 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden, tinha 8918 anos. Ela casou-se com Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania I em 1129, em Powiat szczeciński, szczecińskie, Polônia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1135, em Herzogtum Pommern.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ida Nielsdotter Svendssøn родилась после 1105 г. в местности Европа, её отцу по имени Niels of Denmark было 8936 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden, 8918. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania I в 1129 г. в местности поуят сзкзесиnски, сзкзесиnски, Польша. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1135 г. в местности хирзогтум поммирн.

sm.after 1105–ca 1135: ina ua ma'ea le 1105–e tusa o le 1135

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ida Nielsdotter Svendssøn nació después de 1105, en Europa, su papá, Niels of Denmark, tenía 8936 años y su mamá, Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden, tenía 8918 años. Se casó con Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania I en 1129, en Powiat szczeciński, szczecińskie, Polonia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1135, en Herzogtum Pommern.
